characters.appearance: Male, late 20s, slim build, light brown complexion. Short dark curly hair, short beard, wearing round black-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeve t-shirt with subtle grid pattern, black lavalier mic, smartwatch with blue band, silver ring, red string bracelet.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: All right, this is one of my favourite apps for learning spoken English. [All right, this is one of my favourite apps for learning spoken English.]
Character A says: मैं इसे रोज़ यूज़ करता हूँ। [I use it every day.]
Character A says: इसका नाम Supernova है, और ये एक amazing AI tutor app है। [Its name is Supernova, and it's an amazing AI tutor app.]
Character A says: अगर आप अपनी English improve करना चाहते हैं, तो ये best है। [If you want to improve your English, this is the best.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by introducing a favourite daily-use app.
- Establishes Supernova as an amazing AI tutor for spoken English.
- Sets an enthusiastic, personal recommendation tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
This is one of my favourite Spoken English Apps
Supernova
amazing AI Tutor app

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सिर्फ grammar रटने के बजाय, आप actually AI के साथ English में बात कर सकते हैं। [Instead of just memorising grammar, you can actually talk to the AI in English.]
Character A says: Basically, आप app open करते हैं, और जो भी बोलना चाहते हैं, बोलते हैं। [Basically, you open the app, and speak whatever you want to say.]
Character A says: और ये AI tutor बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह आपको सुनता है, और तुरंत reply करता है, जिससे आपकी झिझक खत्म होती है। [And this AI tutor listens to you just like a friend, and replies instantly, which removes your hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the core mechanism: speaking instead of just reading/typing.
- Highlights the AI tutor's role as a non-judgmental conversational partner.
- Addresses the pain point of hesitation when speaking.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
STOP CRAMMING GRAMMAR
START SPEAKING
Talk to the AI tutor directly. It listens like a friend and replies instantly to remove your hesitation.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: ये normal English classes से बहुत better है। [This is way better than normal English classes.]
Character A says: इसमें real-world situations हैं। [It has real-world situations.]
Character A says: जैसे office meeting या interview की practice, और अगर आप बोलते हुए कोई गलती करते हैं, तो कोई आपको judge नहीं करेगा। [Like practicing for an office meeting or interview, and if you make a mistake while speaking, no one will judge you.]
Character A says: ये AI आपकी गलती पहचान कर आपको सही तरीका बताता है, बिना आपकी flow तोड़े। [This AI recognizes your mistake and tells you the correct way, without breaking your flow.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Lists key differentiators compared to traditional learning methods.
- Emphasizes practical, real-world scenarios like interviews.
- Highlights the safe, non-judgmental correction feature.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
1 way better than normal classes
2 real-world situations
3 non-judgmental corrections

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: हम में से बहुत लोग English समझ तो लेते हैं, पर बोलते time अटक जाते हैं। [Many of us understand English, but get stuck while speaking.]
Character A says: इसीलिए सिर्फ reading और writing छोड़ो, और Supernova के साथ रोज़ speaking practice शुरू करो। [That's why leave just reading and writing, and start daily speaking practice with Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Relates to a common audience struggle: understanding vs. speaking.
- Creates a pivot moment urging the user to change their learning habit.
- Builds urgency to start speaking practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
you should really stop just reading
and instead start speaking with Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अगर आप भी fluent English बोलना चाहते हैं, तो Supernova app download करें। [If you also want to speak fluent English, download the Supernova app.]
Character A says: इनके plans बहुत affordable हैं। [Their plans are very affordable.]
Character A says: इसे try करो और देखो कि कैसे आपकी confidence और career दोनों boost होते हैं! [Try it and see how both your confidence and career get a boost!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear call to action to download the app.
- Mentions affordability without specific pricing.
- Ends on an empowering note about career and confidence growth.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Download Supernova
Affordable Plans
Boost your confidence and career!
